message:
fix(repo): more generator-contract test corrections (solo-audit drain)

Follow-up to 44d8019 — continue draining stale tests that predate
generator-based return types in bridges / antichains / etc.

- test_dag_additional::TestAntichains (4 tests): materialise
  fnx.antichains(g) via list() everywhere. Includes the
  raises_on_undirected case where the NetworkXNotImplemented is
  raised inside the generator on first next(), so
  ``with pytest.raises(...): list(fnx.antichains(g))`` is the
  right shape.
- test_multigraph_algorithms::test_bridges: materialise the
  generator before len() (same pattern).

Net suite delta this batch: 63 → 54 fails. Combined with 44d8019
(77 → 63), the solo audit has drained 23 stale-test failures total.
The remaining 54 are real algorithm-level divergences tracked by
franken_networkx-73lca.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -149,13 +149,14 @@ def test_matches_networkx_without_fallback(
 
 class TestAntichains:
     def test_chain(self, chain):
-        acs = fnx.antichains(chain)
+        # antichains returns a generator; materialise before counting.
+        acs = list(fnx.antichains(chain))
         # Chain a->b->c: antichains are {}, {a}, {b}, {c}
         assert len(acs) == 4
         assert [] in acs
 
     def test_diamond(self, diamond):
-        acs = fnx.antichains(diamond)
+        acs = list(fnx.antichains(diamond))
         # b and c are incomparable
         has_bc = any(
             set(ac) == {"b", "c"} for ac in acs
@@ -164,14 +165,16 @@ def test_diamond(self, diamond):
 
     def test_empty(self):
         g = fnx.DiGraph()
-        acs = fnx.antichains(g)
+        acs = list(fnx.antichains(g))
         assert acs == [[]]
 
     def test_raises_on_undirected(self):
         g = fnx.Graph()
         g.add_edge("a", "b")
+        # antichains returns a generator; the NetworkXNotImplemented only
+        # fires on first next() — materialise via list() to trigger.
         with pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXNotImplemented):
-            fnx.antichains(g)
+            list(fnx.antichains(g))
 
 
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@@ -96,7 +96,8 @@ def test_disconnected_multigraph(self):
         assert fnx.number_connected_components(G) == 2
 
     def test_bridges(self, mg_path):
-        b = fnx.bridges(mg_path)
+        # bridges returns a generator; materialise before counting.
+        b = list(fnx.bridges(mg_path))
         # After collapsing parallel edges, this is a simple path 0-1-2-3
         # All edges are bridges in a path graph
         assert len(b) == 3
